heroHeadline: BREAKING — Trump Issues 48-Hour Ultimatum to Iran as Diplomatic Deadline Looms
heroSubtitle: President Trump gave Iran 48 hours to reach a deal on April 4, intensifying pressure ahead of the April 6 Hormuz deadline. Earlier, IDF strikes damaged a hospital in Tyre; a projectile struck near Bushehr nuclear plant; a downed US pilot was rescued.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
